name: Spam Vegetable Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Cream of Mushroom Soup (10 3/4 oz each)
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, combine the soup, milk, and cheese spread.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the vegetables, SPAM, rice, cheese, and onions.
4. Stir in the soup mixture.
5. Pour the casserole into a 13x9 inch baking pan.
6. Sprinkle the combined crackers and melted butter over the top of the casserole.
7. Bake for 50-55 minutes or until hot.
